primary.usage: Active navigation, selected states, safe primary actions, and focus rings.

secondary.usage: Pending, scheduled, warning, and time-sensitive attention.

neutral.usage: Dark-first app background, panels, tables, inputs, and dividers.

danger.usage: Failed Jobs, destructive actions, hard errors, and conflict outcomes.

display.purpose: Route titles only. Fixed size, never viewport-fluid. Uses Geist, not Inter.

body.purpose: Dense product UI copy, table cells, filters, and error text. Uses Geist, not Inter.

mono.purpose: Job IDs, JSON payloads, cursors, ISO dates, and config values. Uses Geist Mono.

implementation.styling: Tailwind CSS with CSS variables mapped from DESIGN.md tokens.
implementation.primitives: Use shadcn ecosystem components for reusable UI primitives. Do not hand-roll covered primitives.
implementation.font: Geist Variable and Geist Mono Variable via @fontsource-variable/geist and @fontsource-variable/geist-mono, bundled locally. Inter is explicitly not the Dashboard font.

motion.reducedMotion: Disable non-essential transitions and preserve instant state changes.

componentGuidance.shell: Persistent desktop sidebar, mobile drawer, Queue Views first, Jobs second, Health third.
componentGuidance.tables: Manual cursor pagination, server-backed filters and sorting, local row selection, visible refresh and polling state.
componentGuidance.actions: Single delete and all bulk actions require confirmation. Destructive actions are not available through hotkeys or command palette.
componentGuidance.states: Represent loading, empty, unauthorized, forbidden, conflict, not found, read-only, disabled, and capability-limited states explicitly.
